since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.40% · Gold -0.26% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.52%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.52%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NXPI is the standout at -5.89%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +3.14%, NET +3.01%, WDAY +2.76%, CRM +2.38%, SAP +2.32%. Laggards: NXPI -5.89%, MU -5.50%, MRVL -5.41%, LRCX -5.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.29% at $158.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
